description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural brown wood grain top and a painted light gray base. The desk features four straight legs and a single shallow drawer on the front, equipped with two round knobs for easy access. The wood grain on the tabletop is clearly visible, giving it a classic and slightly rustic appearance. The drawer is integrated seamlessly into the front apron, suggesting a functional yet minimalist design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a smooth finish on both the top and the legs. This desk would be suitable for writing, studying, or light office work in a variety of urban settings.
description: A sturdy rectangular desk with a brown wood grain top, light gray legs, and a single front drawer with two round knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown wood grain top, light gray legs, and a single drawer with two round knobs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and the plain, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid light gray back panel and the absence of any drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tabletop edge and plain side panel.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and two knobs is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk.
